title: Virtual MEGA community event with acclaimed behavioral economist (August 7)
excerpt: I am super thrilled to announce our upcoming Community Mega Event in the monday mansion. Get ready to choose your llama avatar explore new insights around personal and team productivity. Plus hear change management strat…

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
I am super thrilled to announce our upcoming Community Mega Event in the monday mansion. Get ready to choose your llama avatar explore new insights around personal and team productivity. Plus hear change management strategies from acclaimed podcast host, author, professor and behavioral economist, Katy Milkman!

The schedule:

  • Start off by exploring our monday mansion booths to uncover new community resources and mingle with productivity enthusiasts worldwide.
  • Tune into our session with an industry expert to learn all all about driving productivity from an individual to a team level.
  • Last, but not least, podcast host, author, and award-winning researcher, Katy Milkman, will share will share strategies and tips for driving change and achieving long-term success within your teams.

Don’t miss out on this unique opportunity Sign up today

MEGA event invites2176×2176 557 KB

Mark your calendars! The event takes place on Tuesday, August 7, from 10AM to 12PM EST.

posts.author: Vituity (Nikki Lopez Mendez)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a replay of this event? I’m very interested in seeing the presentation!
